## Validation

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Site or relevant validation command:

## Public-Readiness Review

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, or `.env` values.
- [ ] No private student, school, employer, job-search, contact, or raw source data.
- [ ] Public-facing claims are accurate and supported by public-safe artifacts.
- [ ] Data is synthetic, anonymized, aggregate-safe, or permission-safe.
